---
title: "VigieRAM — Rapport de surveillance génomique (Tuberculose)"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
  pdf: default
---

```{python}
#| tags: [parameters]
#| echo: false

sample_id = "ERR0000000"
mykrobe_json = "../../results/ERR0000000/mykrobe/ERR0000000.json"
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

import json

with open(mykrobe_json) as f:
    mdata = json.load(f)
mresult = mdata[list(mdata.keys())[0]]

lineage = mresult["phylogenetics"]["lineage"]["lineage"]
lineage_str = lineage[0] if lineage else "NA"
susc = mresult["susceptibility"]

resistant = [a for a in susc if susc[a].get("predict", "").upper() == "R"]
sensitive = [a for a in susc if susc[a].get("predict", "").upper() == "S"]

is_mdr = "Isoniazid" in resistant and "Rifampicin" in resistant
fq = ["Ciprofloxacin", "Levofloxacin", "Moxifloxacin", "Ofloxacin"]
is_pre_xdr = is_mdr and any(a in resistant for a in fq)

if is_pre_xdr:
    niveau_fr, niveau_en = "Pré-XDR (MDR + fluoroquinolones)", "Pre-XDR (MDR + fluoroquinolone resistance)"
elif is_mdr:
    niveau_fr, niveau_en = "MDR-TB (isoniazide + rifampicine)", "MDR-TB (isoniazid + rifampicin resistant)"
else:
    niveau_fr, niveau_en = "Pas de multirésistance détectée", "No multidrug resistance detected"

print(f"## 🇫🇷 Échantillon `{sample_id}`\n")
print(f"**Lignée :** {lineage_str}\n**Niveau de résistance global :** {niveau_fr}\n")
print("| Antituberculeux | Résultat |\n|---|---|")
for a, r in susc.items():
    pred = r.get("predict", "NA").upper()
    label = "🔴 Résistant" if pred == "R" else ("🟢 Sensible" if pred == "S" else "⚪ Non testé")
    print(f"| {a} | {label} |")

print(f"\n---\n## 🇬🇧 Sample `{sample_id}` (English summary)\n")
print(f"**Lineage:** {lineage_str}\n**Overall resistance level:** {niveau_en}\n")
print(f"**Resistant to:** {', '.join(resistant) if resistant else 'none detected'}\n")
print(f"**Susceptible to:** {', '.join(sensitive) if sensitive else 'none detected'}\n")
```
